cards.title: Hab Tender

ability.name: Botanical Calibration
ability.text: Bootstrap: When this Frame enters play, gain 1 Signal. At end of turn, restore 1 Integrity to an allied Frame.

cards.notes: Style: Cinematic live-action prop photography. Negative: anime, manga, illustration, text, watermark, human face. Palette: teal, brushed steel, warm green.
cards.image_prompt: A small, utilitarian robotic gardener with articulated sensor arms and a clean pale steel chassis, tending to glowing hydroponic root-cables, soft teal grow-light illumination, high-detail macro photography, depth of field.

cards.title: Root Cable Walker

ability.name: Root-Network Stasis
ability.text: Hardline: Opponents must engage this Frame before others when able. Shield: The next harm this Frame would take is redirected to the Shield buffer instead.

cards.notes: Style: Photorealistic sci-fi hardware. Negative: anime, illustration, glowing eyes, human features. Palette: cool steel, pale teal, dark industrial shadows.
cards.image_prompt: A four-legged walking chassis companion constructed from recycled lab piping and steel, metallic cables coiled around its frame like roots, positioned in a quiet hydroponic chamber, soft diffused canopy lighting.

cards.title: Canopy Drone

ability.name: Canopy Uplink
ability.text: Relay: Can influence distant Frames without close engagement. Signal: This Frame holds the grid, it cannot be displaced while Integrity remains.

cards.notes: Style: Industrial design photography. Negative: anime, manga, cartoon, grit, grime, textures of paint, human pilots. Palette: monochromatic white, teal, chrome.
cards.image_prompt: A floating spherical drone with polished steel casing and holographic interface rings, drifting near glass laboratory ceilings, soft teal light reflecting off its smooth surface, high-end clean sci-fi aesthetic.

cards.title: Cryo Tender

ability.name: Frost Stitch
ability.text: Recalibrate: When this Frame enters play, restore 2 Integrity to an allied Frame.

cards.notes: No anime, no manga, no illustration, no text, no frame, focus on clean industrial design and cool color palette.
cards.image_prompt: A small, four-legged maintenance robot with pearl-white ceramic plating and pale cyan coolant tubes running along its back, standing in a brightly lit, sterile laboratory setting near a large glass cryo tank, soft clinical lighting, photorealistic, 3:4 portrait ratio.

cards.title: Frost Glass Drone

ability.name: Refraction Array
ability.text: Bootstrap: When this Frame enters play, gain 1 Signal. Shield: This unit ignores the next source of disruption.

cards.notes: No anime, no manga, no illustration, no text, no frame, focus on transparency and light diffusion.
cards.image_prompt: A sleek, hovering drone with a translucent frosted glass central chassis and internal soft glowing cyan circuitry, smooth floating movement, laboratory interior with frost-covered surfaces, photorealistic, cinematic prop photography, 3:4 portrait ratio.

cards.title: Coolant Runner

ability.name: Thermal Equilibrium
ability.text: Link: Choose an allied Frame to share a keyword with. Pulse: At the end of your turn, restore 1 Integrity to all Linked Frames.

cards.notes: No anime, no manga, no illustration, no text, no frame, high-detail mechanical textures.
cards.image_prompt: A bipedal research Frame with broad, cooling fins and polished pearl metallic armor, blue bioluminescent nodes, standing in a river of flowing liquid coolant inside a Spire laboratory bay, high-key clean lighting, photorealistic, 3:4 portrait ratio.

cards.title: Ring Keeper

ability.name: Magnetic Stabilization
ability.text: Hardline: Opponents must engage this Frame before others when able. While this Frame has Integrity, adjacent allied Frames cannot be displaced.

cards.notes: No anime, no illustration, no text. Palette: Pale steel, amber glow, copper accents. Portrait 3:4 composition.
cards.image_prompt: A sturdy, compact maintenance robot with a circular rotating ring torso, warm copper plating, soft amber light emanating from internal rings, standing in a sterile pale steel laboratory corridor, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, highly detailed mechanical joints.

cards.title: Conduit Frame

ability.name: Plasma Integration
ability.text: Link: When this Frame enters play, establish a Link with one allied Frame (share a keyword until either leaves). Relay: Can influence distant Frames without close engagement.

cards.notes: No anime, no illustration, no text. Palette: Warm copper, pale steel, bright amber plasma glow. Portrait 3:4 composition.
cards.image_prompt: A sleek, bipedal relay robot with glowing plasma conduits running through its translucent limbs, soft amber lighting, clean laboratory setting, precision engineering aesthetic, depth of field, photorealistic photography.

cards.title: Amber Pilot

ability.name: Engine Calibration
ability.text: Recalibrate: Restore 2 Integrity to an allied Frame. Pulse: At end of turn, apply a small Integrity restore to all linked Frames.

cards.notes: No anime, no illustration, no text. Palette: Pale steel, polished copper, warm amber light. Portrait 3:4 composition.
cards.image_prompt: A sophisticated laboratory drone with a central amber optical sensor, intricate copper plating, hovering above a reactor ring, soft warm glow illuminating the surrounding sterile equipment, photorealistic, cinematic prop lighting.

cards.title: Relay Ghost

ability.name: Ghost Transmission
ability.text: When this Frame enters play, gain 1 Signal and establish a Relay to an allied Frame across the grid.

cards.notes: Negative prompt: anime, manga, illustration, text, watermark. Palette: pale steel, soft violet, neon cyan.
cards.image_prompt: A small hovering drone with translucent violet panels, sleek metallic frame, floating inside a clean laboratory filled with soft cyan signal mist, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, 3:4 ratio.

cards.title: Dish Walker

ability.name: Aperture Guard
ability.text: While this Frame is active, its Shield buffer absorbs incoming Signal disruption directed at nearby allied Frames.

cards.notes: Negative prompt: anime, manga, illustration, text, watermark. Focus on structural integrity and observation gear.
cards.image_prompt: A tripod-legged robot walker with a large circular sensor dish for a head, standing on a polished white floor in a vast observatory, clean steel construction, soft lighting, photorealistic, 3:4 ratio.

cards.title: Signal Mist Frame

ability.name: Mist Harmonizer
ability.text: At end of turn, apply a Pulse to restore 2 Integrity to all linked Frames and gain 1 Signal.

cards.notes: Negative prompt: anime, manga, illustration, text, watermark. Emphasis on atmospheric signal mist and soft glow.
cards.image_prompt: A tall, slender chassis robot emitting soft blue vapor from its joints, sleek aesthetic, glowing data conduits running along its limbs, laboratory setting, highly detailed, photorealistic, 3:4 ratio.
